title: hieracium mixtum subsp. candidum
intro: Hieracium mixtum subsp. candidum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium mixtum subsp. candidum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
